title: 25:02 â January 15, 2025
body_text:
25:02 â January 15, 2025
Update to the Enterprise Fraud Management Part
We updated the Enterprise Fraud Management Part to reflect all
version 4.7 upgrades
.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Enterprise Fraud Management
Entire Part
Updated many images.
Added reminders and instructions regarding how comments are visible on other systems and applications and how comments must be appropriate and descriptive for EFM users and customers.
Section 7.3, Overview of Incidents on the Incidents Page
Section 7.5, Using the Filters Sidebar in the Open Incident List
Added description for the Highest Score column and filter.
Section 7.4, Tags
New section.
Section 7.8, Viewing Incidents in the Open List
Updated description for the Risk Score column of the Activity timeline.
Section 8.2, Identifying a Transaction as Fraudulent
Section 8.7, Revising a Previously Identified Alert
Section 8.10, Recovery of Funds
Added information on how and when to use the Initiate Fund Recovery box.
Section 8.4, Identifying Alerts in Auto Risk Transactions
An update was made to the Auto Risk procedures. All Auto Risk transactions must now be identified as Risk or No-risk.
Section 8.6, Adding Manual Alerts in Bulk
Added a new section with instructions on how to add manual alerts in bulk from the incident page or the Events search results page.
Questions
EFM Support, email
support@central1.com
.
